message:
fix: auto-create Dolt branch on BD_BRANCH checkout failure (dolt-test-bx8z)

When BD_BRANCH is set and the branch doesn't exist, auto-create it from
the current branch before retrying checkout. Makes polecats self-healing
instead of failing hard on missing branches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
